text:
Gasoline (ガソリン, Gasorin) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

Summary

A container of gasoline. This substance is quite flammable and will catch fire easily.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.14170 :: ガソリン 
ガラスの入れ物に入っている燃料 揮発性があり よく燃える
|-
![Eng]
|No.14170 :: Gasoline 
Fuel contained within a glass container. It is a volatile substance and will burn well.
|}

Trivia

Gon uses this card against Genthru to prevent him using his Little Flower Nen ability.
